objective: Land /learn:profile flow vNext: Chinese-only UX, background required & persisted, topic coverage loop (no manual Add Topic), default single-topic assessment entry, and p-e2e-* isolation.

tasks.description: Backend: isolate p-e2e-* profiles in learn:list-profiles, learn:set-active-profile, and learn:update-state (active_profile_id).
Profile create flow: move pre_context before background; make background required with reuse/update; persist to profile.background; Chinese prompts.
Topic coverage validation loop: recommended topics (from learn:parse-background) + free text补漏 + confirm covered; then pick exactly one topic to assess; remove manual Add Topic.
Update flow: ensure no background expansion; Chinese prompts; keep a single-topic assessment entry; hide legacy options as needed.
Doc restructure: add Phase headings and explanation for taxonomy-first resolve; preserve Phase 4/5 headings and other doc invariants required by tests.
Validation: run npm test; update/adjust any doc tests triggered by changes (without weakening invariants unintentionally).
